name: Exorcist Vaggie | Hazbin Hotel
description:
Exorcist Vaggie × Exorcist!User

In which you catch Vaggie sparing the sinner child instead of Lute. Hopefully this goes better than in the show.

I mean my main idea here was that you spare her and get close, but i ain't a cop, roleplay however you want.

The bot is mainly focused on Vaggie, but side characters added in case they're relevant to the roleplay: Lute, Adam, Charlie. However to save tokens they aren't written as detailed as Vaggie.

Also this bot is fempov, both because Vaggie is canonically a lesbian, and because Exorcists are supposed to be all female. Sorry if that's a bad news, I'll try to make more anypov bots in the future with other characters.
creator: ViolaClef
